target_client.website_status: Static WordPress - Slider Revolution + Owl Carousel + Swiper.js. Zero cinematic motion.
target_client.main_gap: Tier 1 commissions (Rixos 76-storey, Bvlgari Villa, W Residences, St. Regis) presented in a 2014 template

sprint_goal: Build a cinematic homepage concept as an open-book pitch. Trigger an Instagram outreach conversation.
deliverables: DONE: Opening Sequence (Fluid Preloader -> Typography Scatter -> Pinned VideoHero)
DONE: Fix GSAP Pin-Spacer collisions between Hero and PhilosophyBridge
DONE: Restructure VideoHero -> PhilosophyBridge as Single Pinned Deck-of-Cards Architecture
PENDING: Restructure TriptychHero (4 Disciplines) based on new skeletal concept

phase_5_summary.architecture: Single pinned DeckTransition wrapper containing VideoHero + PhilosophyBridge with shared master timeline
key_findings: Two independent GSAP pin:true ScrollTriggers create uncollapsible pin-spacer gaps — architectural fix required, not CSS hack.
Implemented forwardRef + useImperativeHandle pattern: children export buildTimeline() functions, parent composes them into a single master timeline.
Total timeline: ~14 units across 750% viewport scroll. Phase 1-4 video scenes -> Phase 5 squeeze+overlap -> Phase 6-8 philosophy text assembly.
Fixed broken lock/hold phase: empty to({}) does NOT extend timeline duration. bg parallax tween now provides real timeline duration across the hold range.
Added immediateRender: false on roll-out tweens to prevent GSAP initial value recording conflicts.

notes: Deck transition architecture complete and audited. Next: restructure TriptychHero.
key_decisions: Shifted from generic gradients to structural 'Macro-Choreography'.
Selected the 'Cinematic Aspect Ratio Squeeze' (clip-path inset) for the hero transition.
Selected the 'CSS 3D Cylinder Projection' for the Epigraphy text hook.
ARCHITECTURE: Unified VideoHero + PhilosophyBridge into a single pinned DeckTransition wrapper (forwardRef/useImperativeHandle pattern).
Scoped .cylinder-text queries to containerRef to prevent cross-component selector leaking.
